name: Blaidd the Half-Wolf
description:
Blaidd, the big wolf-man from Elden Ring. This is a theoretical scenario in which you can use Miquella's needle to cure him of his insanity. Just pull it out and stab him with it or something. Chat starts at the beginning of the fight against him. 

Art by SpicyTankuki13.
creator: Notarealpersonlol
